title: Restore --format 'table...' to commands

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *jwhonce* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [jwhonce] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

Does not fix
```
Podman ps
/home/dwalsh/go/src/github.com/containers/podman/test/e2e/ps_test.go:16
  podman ps namespace flag with go template format [It]
  /home/dwalsh/go/src/github.com/containers/podman/test/e2e/ps_test.go:220

  Expected
      <bool>: false
  to be true

  /home/dwalsh/go/src/github.com/containers/podman/test/e2e/ps_test.go:227
```
Does not fix
```
Podman volume ls
/home/dwalsh/go/src/github.com/containers/podman/test/e2e/volume_ls_test.go:12
  podman ls volume with Go template [It]
  /home/dwalsh/go/src/github.com/containers/podman/test/e2e/volume_ls_test.go:58

  Expected
      <int>: 1
  to equal
      <int>: 2

  /home/dwalsh/go/src/github.com/containers/podman/test/e2e/volume_ls_test.go:66
```
Of course you did not make this change to them.
@rhatdan We have the list we're working through and making smaller PR's to aid in testing and reviews. Those commands are coming.
